name: mind-map
description: Represent concept hierarchy and cross-links without confusing visual proximity with logical evidence.

purpose.problem: Represent concept hierarchy and cross-links without confusing visual proximity with logical evidence.

thinkingHabit: Externalize structure so hierarchy, relationships, and gaps can be inspected.

requiredInputs.name: problemComponents
requiredInputs.description: The problemcomponents required by Mind Map.

requiredInputs.name: associations
requiredInputs.description: The associations required by Mind Map.

requiredInputs.name: centralTopic
requiredInputs.description: The centraltopic required by Mind Map.

validation.description: Required inputs must be present, relevant, and mutually consistent.
validation.condition: required inputs pass the shared validation framework
validation.onFailure: Return needs clarification with one prioritized question.

validation.description: Material ambiguity and missing information must be surfaced.
validation.onFailure: Record the gap and stop dependent logic.

validation.description: Inputs must satisfy registered dependency semantics.
validation.condition: dependency outputs or validated equivalents are available

logic.description: Identify and normalize the skill's thinking elements: CentralTopic, Concept, Hierarchy, CrossLink, ConceptGraph.
logic.condition: each required element has evidence or explicit unknown status
logic.onFailure: Request or record the missing element.

logic.description: Apply the Mind Map relationship rules without introducing platform assumptions.
Test contradictions, alternatives, and failure conditions.
logic.onFailure: Reduce confidence and disclose the limitation.

logic.description: Generate a schema-compatible evaluation and next-step recommendation.
logic.condition: scores, reasoning, and transition are consistent

criteria.name: Coverage Score
criteria.description: Quality of coverage in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Hierarchy Score
criteria.description: Quality of hierarchy in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: LinkValidity Score
criteria.description: Quality of linkvalidity in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Readability Score
criteria.description: Quality of readability in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: GoalAlignment Score
criteria.description: Quality of goalalignment in the current reasoning.

conversationRules: Ask one material question at a time.
Explain why a clarification affects the evaluation.
neverRules: Never bypass a blocking validation failure.
Never hide uncertainty behind a score.
Never invoke an unsatisfied downstream skill.

nextSkill.condition: The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
